parameters.query: SELECT f.*, c.nom, c.siret, c.adresse, c.code_postal, c.ville, c.pays, c.numero_tva FROM factures f LEFT JOIN clients c ON f.client_id = c.id WHERE f.id = '{{ $json.factureId }}' AND f.tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'
SELECT * FROM lignes_facture WHERE facture_id = '{{ $json.factureId }}' ORDER BY ordre
SELECT nom_entreprise, siret, numero_tva, adresse, code_postal, ville, pays, email FROM tenants WHERE id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'

parameters.jsCode:
const facture = $input.all()[0]?.json?.[0] || {};
const lignes = $input.all()[1]?.json || [];
const emetteur = $input.all()[2]?.json?.[0] || {};

const xmlDeclaration = '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>';
const namespace = 'xmlns="urn:un:unece:uncefact:data:standard:CrossIndustryInvoice:100"';

let lignesXml = '';
lignes.forEach((ligne, idx) => {
  lignesXml += `
    <IncludedSupplyChainTradeLineItem>
      <AssociatedDocumentLineDocument>
        <LineID>${idx + 1}</LineID>
      </AssociatedDocumentLineDocument>
      <SpecifiedTradeProduct>
        <Name>${ligne.description || 'Product ' + (idx + 1)}</Name>
      </SpecifiedTradeProduct>
      <SpecifiedLineTradeAgreement>
        <GrossPriceProductPrice>
          <ChargeAmount>${ligne.prix_unitaire}</ChargeAmount>
        </GrossPriceProductPrice>
      </SpecifiedLineTradeAgreement>
      <SpecifiedLineTradeSettlement>
        <ApplicableTradeTax>
          <TypeCode>VAT</TypeCode>
          <RateApplicablePercent>${ligne.taux_tva || 20}</RateApplicablePercent>
        </ApplicableTradeTax>
        <SpecifiedTradeSettlementLineMonetarySummation>
          <LineTotalAmount>${ligne.montant_ht}</LineTotalAmount>
        </SpecifiedTradeSettlementLineMonetarySummation>
      </SpecifiedLineTradeSettlement>
    </IncludedSupplyChainTradeLineItem>`;
});

const xml = `${xmlDeclaration}
<CrossIndustryInvoice ${namespace}>
  <ExchangedDocumentContext>
    <GuidelineSpecifiedDocumentContextParameter>
      <ID>${$json.profil === 'MINIMUM' ? 'urn:cen.eu:en16931:profiles:invoice:05:minimal' : 
           $json.profil === 'BASIC' ? 'urn:cen.eu:en16931:profiles:invoice:05:basic' : 
           'urn:cen.eu:en16931:profiles:invoice:05:compliant'}</ID>
    </GuidelineSpecifiedDocumentContextParameter>
  </ExchangedDocumentContext>
  <ExchangedDocument>
    <ID>${facture.numero_facture}</ID>
    <TypeCode>380</TypeCode>
    <IssueDateTime>
      <DateTimeString format="102">${new Date(facture.date_facture).toISOString().split('T')[0].replace(/-/g, '')}</DateTimeString>
    </IssueDateTime>
  </ExchangedDocument>
  <SupplyChainTradeTransaction>
    <ApplicableHeaderTradeAgreement>
      <SellerTradeParty>
        <Name>${emetteur.nom_entreprise}</Name>
        <SpecifiedLegalOrganization>
          <ID schemeID="0002">${emetteur.siret}</ID>
        </SpecifiedLegalOrganization>
        <URIUniversalCommunication>
          <URIID schemeID="EM">${emetteur.email}</URIID>
        </URIUniversalCommunication>
      </SellerTradeParty>
      <BuyerTradeParty>
        <Name>${facture.nom}</Name>
      </BuyerTradeParty>
    </ApplicableHeaderTradeAgreement>
    <ApplicableHeaderTradeSettlement>
      <InvoiceCurrencyCode>${facture.devise || 'EUR'}</InvoiceCurrencyCode>
      <SpecifiedTradeSettlementHeaderMonetarySummation>
        <DuePayableAmount>${facture.montant_ttc}</DuePayableAmount>
      </SpecifiedTradeSettlementHeaderMonetarySummation>
    </ApplicableHeaderTradeSettlement>
    <IncludedSupplyChainTradeLineItem>${lignesXml}
    </IncludedSupplyChainTradeLineItem>
  </SupplyChainTradeTransaction>
</CrossIndustryInvoice>`;

return {
  ...($json),
  xmlContent: xml.trim(),
  facture: facture,
  emetteur: emetteur,
  lignesCount: lignes.length
};

parameters.text:
🇫🇷 Factur-X - Facturation Électronique

Ordonnance n°2021-1190 du 15/09/2021
Obligatoire réception: sept 2026
Obligatoire émission: sept 2027

Format: PDF/A-3 + XML CII (Cross-Industry Invoice)
Profils:
- MINIMUM: champs essentiels
- BASIC: champs etendus
- EN16931: compliant standard europeen
